title: OTFT
description: O is for Tick Freeze Toggle.
body:
# **O is for Tick Freeze Toggle.**

If you are in **Creative** Mode or Spectator Mode then you can press **'o'**.
Then The game will run **the command "Tick Freeze"** but if you press **'o'** agin then it will run **the command "Tick Unfreeze"** and will unfreeze the game.

There is an item called **"Tick Tock Clock"** that **can tick freeze a Survival Mode Person's game** but **only for a certain amount of time.**


<details>
<summary>Keybind and Item Version</summary>

- Version 1.0.0 - Only includes the key bind.
- Version 1.0.1 - Contains the key bind and item.

</details>
